# custom_destination_trust_certificate (Data Source)

Get the X.509 trust certificate (in PEM format) for the subaccount. The public key in the certificate can be used to validate SAML assertions by the target token service.

Subaccount is determined by the passed OAuth access token.

**Further documentation:**
<https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/set-up-trust-between-systems>

## Example Usage

```terraform
# read a destination trust certificate
data "custom_destination_trust_certificate" "main" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `certificate` (String) X.509 trust certificate in PEM format
